title: Turn 10,994 Notes Into Memory - Paul Iusztin, Decoding AI & Louis-François Bouchard, Towards AI
summary: Paul Iusztin and Louis-François Bouchard discuss techniques for transforming diverse sources like notes, documents, videos, and code repositories into memory structures for AI agents. The approach addresses converting unstructured knowledge into actionable agent memory.
